reviews.text: Dr Weiss is the most informed and well-rounded doctor that I've ever encountered. Not only does he have published papers but continues to read up on the latest studies to best help his patients. If you're looking for a Dr who allows you to take an active part in your healthcare and has open, honest discussions about potential root causes, treatments, and pros/cons, Dr Weiss is your guy. I initially came into his office after multiple miscarriages and improper care from local endocrinologists who aren't informed on how to treat hypothyroidism in pregnancy. The office staff are great as well, especially the resident pup and in house Quest lab.

reviews.text: Dr. Weiss and his incredible team have truly transformed my health journey. If you're looking for a doctor who genuinely cares and makes a real difference, Dr. Weiss is the one to see!

I pay out of pocket and I feel like I am getting the best care for my money.

reviews.text:
TRTMD is one of the best health care decisions I have ever made. Their staff is knowledgeable, professional, and each visit is a personalized, tailored approach to my health.

The front office staff incredible- ordering medication, working with my comprehensive travel schedule, and always ensuring that my medication is ordered and delivered to me without issue, all around the county. They reach out for appointment reminders, prescription refills, and general check-ups routinely.

Nurse Leslie checks me in at each appointment, remembers personal details about me and my personal life, and contacts me routinely to ensure I take my medication appropriately (which is apparently a full time job. Thank you Leslie!)

Dr. Neelesh Thussu took the time to learn about my past medical history and future fitness goals. He then tailored a protocol specific to my needs. He answers each and every one of my calls whenever I have questions and shares his plethora of knowledge throughout each interaction.

I feel better than ever and I owe it all to the incredible services and staff of TRTMD.

reviews.text: Ellen is FANTASTIC! Seriously do not sleep on seeing her if you are considering taking steps to feel your best! I’ll be going to Ellen every time!

reviews.text:
My experience with Renew has been really amazing! No Cap whatsoever. When I reached out to the company I had already made the decision fatigued, fat, depressed life in order.  But I was struggling to do so.  Its hard work and there is nothing wrong with a little help.  The help from renew has worked wonders for me.

I feel like they are more like my partner in my well being than I as their disassociated patient.  The Patient Coordinator Taylor explained everything to me about their offerings, from the inherent science that makes up me as a person, and how to optimize my health, energy, sex life, personal and working relationships.  And its a conversation, not a hierarchical shoving match that can sometimes happen with health care or well being providers.  Any questions I had (& I had many that I thought were dumb) were quickly and warmly addressed as if I was talking to a brother or a friend.

I am 45 years old going on 46 and I am feeling the best that I have ever felt in my life.  My confidence and love life is the best its ever been.  My vigor to conquer the world and rule the day is evidenced in my walk and talk.  I am a better presenter and public speaker. My laughter and zeal and appreciation for life's gifts are all heightened.

Renew Vitality's products and services were the Auxiliary Boosters to my Spaceship.  And now the Sky is the Limit!

reviews.text:
I had an amazing experience with Alfred Tetteh at Vybrant Health and Wellness and honestly can’t recommend him enough. From the start, he was incredibly thorough, caring, and easy to talk to.

What really stood out to me was how detailed he was with my labs. This was by far the most in depth testing I have ever had done, and Alfred took the time to explain everything clearly, what each result meant, why it mattered, and how it all tied into my overall health. I never felt rushed, and he made sure all my questions were answered. It was refreshing to work with someone who truly wants you to understand your own health.

Alfred is extremely knowledgeable and clearly an expert in weight loss and hormone replacement therapy. You can tell he genuinely cares about his patients and takes a personalized approach instead of a one size fits all plan. I felt confident and supported every step of the way.

The facility itself was also great. It was very clean, organized, and professional, which made the whole experience even better.

If you are looking for someone who is both highly skilled and truly invested in your well being, I highly recommend Alfred Tetteh at Vybrant Health and Wellness. This has been one of the best healthcare experiences I have had, and I am so glad I found him.

My Testosterone was low and we came up with a treatment plan and let me say the results have been life changing. Between the weight loss and TRT my mood and confidence have soared. I would encourage anyone looking to improve their life to go see Thelma immediately.  She is very knowledgeable and caring.  It has been a wonderful experience.

As of today, August 4, 2021 Metro Men's Health has neither acknowledged nor replied to my request in writing.
Today, (August 4) I went in person to the location at which I was treated in Towson, Maryland.  Sam, the receptionist provided me with corporate office contact information.  I will be pursuing my refund through the provided channels.
I hope to avoid litigation.   However,  if that is what it takes to get the $5,000.00 I paid then so be it.
Joseph S. Moore
